subject: fix: Make CertificateRequestAttributes hashable to prevent unnecessary recreation of certificate requests in relation data. (#322)
one_line_summary: Added __hash__ to CertificateRequestAttributes so set/dict lookups work correctly, preventing unnecessary certificate request recreation in relation data.

subject: fix: correct type checking errors in tls-certificates lib (#326)
one_line_summary: Fixed pyright type checking errors in tls-certificates lib including generic type parameters, Mapping vs MutableMapping, and pyright ignore comments.

subject: fix: correct silent CI lint failures + types for snap lib (#328)
one_line_summary: Fixed CI lint script that silently swallowed failures (missing exit $FAILURES) and corrected Python 3.8-compatible typing imports for snap lib.

subject: fix: Renew expiring certs missed by the secret expired event handler (#311)
one_line_summary: Added safety-net renewal check during relation-changed to catch expiring certificates that the secret_expired event handler missed, preventing certificate expiry and downtime.

subject: fix: Bump the version of the tls lib (#296)
one_line_summary: Bumped tls-certificates version from 1.2.0 to 1.3.0 and corrected changelog date.

subject: fix: correct default CODEOWNERS specification (#292)
one_line_summary: Fixed CODEOWNERS default pattern from '.' to '*' so that GitHub correctly assigns reviewers to all files.

subject: fix: Add hash function to cert classes (#280)
one_line_summary: Added missing __hash__ to PrivateKey, Certificate, and CertificateSigningRequest classes after migration from dataclasses broke hashability.

subject: fix: (tls-certificates) store Mode.APP secrets as app-owned secrets (#267)
one_line_summary: Fixed Mode.APP to store private key as app-owned secret instead of unit-owned, preventing non-leader units from incorrectly generating/accessing secrets.

subject: fix: snap log num_lines can be 'all' as well as an int (#250)
one_line_summary: Updated snap logs() type annotation for num_lines to accept Literal['all'] in addition to int, matching actual snap CLI behavior.

subject: fix: use locked dependencies to run interface tests (#239)
one_line_summary: Switched tracing interface test config from 'uv pip compile' to 'uv export --frozen' to use locked dependencies and fix flaky test failures.

subject: fix: Log correct renewal_relative_time in error message (#226)
one_line_summary: Corrected error message to say 'between 0.5 and 1.0' instead of 'between 0.0 and 1.0' to match the actual validation check.

subject: fix: move interface definition to subdir (#186)
one_line_summary: Moved tracing interface definition files from tracing/v*/ to tracing/interface/v*/ to match expected directory structure.

subject: apt: fix dependency name (#119)
one_line_summary: Fixed README to reference correct package name 'charmlibs-apt' instead of 'charmlibs-pathops'.

subject: fix: consistent behaviour for mkdir chown args when exists (#48)
one_line_summary: Made user/group arguments to pathops write methods consistently apply ownership changes to existing files, not just new files.

subject: fix: write methods no longer change existing mode unless it's passed explicitly (#47)
one_line_summary: Changed write_bytes/write_text to not reset file permissions on existing files unless mode is explicitly passed, preventing unintended permission changes.

subject: fix: Fileinfo.{user,group} are typed optional but should always be present (#43)
one_line_summary: Replaced silent fallback to empty string with assertion that FileInfo.user/group are never None, fixing incorrect Optional typing.

subject: fix: strip whitespace from runtime version string (#34)
one_line_summary: Added .strip() when reading _version.txt to remove trailing newline that caused version string to contain whitespace.

subject: ci: fix workflow filenames and correct name in yaml (#33)
one_line_summary: Renamed GitHub Actions workflow files to include 'charmlibs-' prefix and corrected workflow name in YAML so publish pipelines trigger correctly.

subject: fix: make ensure_contents accept PathProtocol typed paths (#21)
one_line_summary: Widened ensure_contents() path parameter type to accept PathProtocol instead of only str|PathLike|ContainerPath, fixing type errors for callers using the protocol type.
